title: Fluxly Hitboxes
description: A mod for people who play with hitboxes on. Change the color of hitboxes, which parts are shown, remove the annoying hitboxes from item frames, etc.
body:
A mod for people who play with hitboxes on. Change the color of hitboxes, which parts are shown, remove the annoying hitboxes from item frames, etc.

Features include:

Toggle hitboxes on by default

Toggle large hitbox around ender dragon

Toggle entity bounding box

Toggle eye level indicator

Toggle direction indicator

Change the hitbox color when an entity is targeted

Toggle hitboxes on item drops

Toggle hitboxes on item frames

Toggle hitboxes on paintings

Toggle hitboxes on boats

Toggle hitboxes on thrown items

Recolor hitboxes (rgba):

Bounding box color
Dragon segment color
Eye level indicator color
Direction indicator color
Targeted entity bounding box color
Item hitbox color

## Dependencies
This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config) + [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
